highlights.text: Grand Palace, ICONSIAM & Phi Phi Islands speedboat
Tropical botanical gardens & farewell gala dinner

itinerary.title: Bangkok Phuket Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Bangkok • Grand Palace • Phuket • Phi Phi Islands
itinerary.overview: Best Bangkok Phuket Family Tour — royal heritage in Bangkok and azure island paradise in Phuket with private Phi Phi speedboat charter.
itinerary.seo_title: TH-003 | Bangkok Phuket Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05N/06D Thailand family package (TH-003): Grand Palace, ICONSIAM, Phi Phi Islands, and Phuket botanical gardens.

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok & Riverfront Welcome
days.description: VIP reception at Suvarnabhumi. Private van to premium hotel. Welcome dinner at river-view restaurant.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport reception, city orientation
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Premium Lifestyle Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Welcome Buffet Dinner

days.title: Bangkok Heritage & ICONSIAM
days.description: Grand Palace, Wat Phra Kaew, Wat Pho, and ICONSIAM luxury waterfront mall.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Grand Palace, Wat Phra Kaew, Wat Pho, ICONSIAM
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Premium Lifestyle Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Thai Bistro Lunch

days.title: Bangkok to Phuket Coastal Escape
days.description: Internal flight to Phuket. Beachfront resort check-in and Andaman sunset.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Internal flight coordination, beachfront check-in
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Ocean View Family Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Beachfront Family Dinner

days.title: Phi Phi Islands Marine Expedition
days.description: Private speedboat to Phi Phi Islands with snorkeling and island buffet lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private speedboat to Phi Phi Islands, reef snorkeling
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Ocean View Family Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Island Beachside Buffet Lunch

days.title: Cultural Gardens & Farewell Gala
days.description: Tropical botanical gardens tour. Grand farewell gala dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tropical garden botanical tour
Evening Experience: Grand farewell gala dinner
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Ocean View Family Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Phuket Departure
days.description: Final breakfast at resort. Private transfer to Phuket International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in premium family hotels across Bangkok and Phuket
Private luxury van and domestic flight coordination to Phuket
Grand Palace, ICONSIAM, and Phi Phi Islands private speedboat
International airfare and Thailand visa fees
